title: PheedLoop API
description: PheedLoop event-platform API auth: two static headers (X-API-KEY + X-API-SECRET) plus the organization code, which is part of the API path (/api/v3/organization/{OrganizationCode}/).

ApiKey.title: API Key
ApiKey.description: PheedLoop API key, sent as the X-API-KEY header (static, not a Bearer token).

ApiSecret.title: API Secret
ApiSecret.description: PheedLoop API secret, sent as the X-API-SECRET header (static, not a Bearer token).

OrganizationCode.title: Organization Code
OrganizationCode.description: PheedLoop organization code embedded in the API path (/api/v3/organization/{OrganizationCode}/).
